dict.string: We need camera access to capture photos and videos for device monitoring and security features.
We need microphone access for audio recording and two-way communication features.
We need access to your precise location for location-based device automation and control.
We need background location access for location-based automation and geofencing features.
We need background location access to enable location-based device automation.
We need Bluetooth access to connect to and control your smart devices.
We need Bluetooth access to continuously discover and connect to nearby devices.
We need motion and fitness data access for device activity tracking features.
We need health data access to integrate with fitness and biometric devices.
We need access to your contacts for device sharing and multi-user functionality.
We need access to your photos and videos for camera device playback and management.
We need permission to save photos and videos captured by your device cameras.
We need access to your calendar for scheduling device automation and events.
We need access to your reminders to create device-related notifications and alerts.
We need access to phone information for device integration and communication features.
We need permission to send you notifications about your device status and alerts.
We need Face ID access to securely authenticate and control your smart home devices.
